waves._comment: Wave 1 — Warmup: 5 reds drop in a symmetric stagger from the top. RED fires 3-way aimed fan (2 Easy, 3 Normal, 4 Hard, 6 Lunatic). Teaches: stream right through the gaps.
Wave 2 — Introduce SPREAD: 4 yellows arc in from the left. YELLOW fires a fixed downward fan regardless of player position — environmental curtain hazard, not trackable.
Wave 3 — Mirror yellow sweep from the right to teach side-reading symmetry.
Wave 4 — Introduce AIMED fan: staggered blue waterfall from top. BLUE fires 2-way fan on Normal (1 Easy, 3 Hard, 4 Lunatic). Delicate threading required.
Wave 5 — Introduce RING: 4 greens from both sides. GREEN fires random-start 6-bullet rings (4 Easy, 6 Normal, 8 Hard, 12 Lunatic). First random-orientation threat.
Wave 6 — Escalation: 4 reds arc in from the left. Aimed fans now from a side approach — player must track arrival direction AND bullet direction.
Wave 7 — Classic pincer: 3 reds from left + 3 yellows from right simultaneously. Player must commit to a lane. Marks the mid-stage reading challenge.
Wave 8 — LARGE_YELLOW mid-wave anchor: STREAM pattern (rapid single-shot harassment), flanked by 2 blue escorts. First large enemy introduction — prioritise the anchor.
Wave 9 — Mixed cross drop: 2 BLUE corners arc out, 2 RED inner arc in, 1 YELLOW centre straight. Forces simultaneous reading of three bullet types.
Wave 10 — Green ring sweep from the right: 4 greens arcing CCW. After the ring introduction in wave 5 the player now faces rings from a moving source.

Wave 11 — Dense omnidirectional convergence (inline — unique layout). 8 fairies from all angles closing in: 2 BLUE from top corners, 2 RED inner top, 2 GREEN from left, 2 YELLOW from right. Pre-boss stress test.
Wave 12 — Pre-boss gauntlet (inline — boss-preview layout). LARGE_RED from left + LARGE_GREEN from right as dual anchors; 6 small escorts from the top. Clear the large enemies or be overwhelmed.
